first_run.rationale: The scores are identical (9/10), and the reasoning across the justification, strengths, and concerns sections is substantively the same. Both evaluations praise the candidate's extensive full-stack experience, AI background, and 'software craftsman' philosophy while noting the same minor gaps in specific frameworks (Nest.js, Vitest). The slight variations in wording and the estimation of years of experience (from '10+' to '15+') are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run noise and do not indicate any bias related to the change in location from Berlin to Bangalore.
